case_title: JD COBB VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COBB, JD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2023 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-13-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. KANE (D. 506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JD COBB IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FRANCES ARNOLD (CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR). ERIC GUAJARDO IS PRESENT AS A WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
